controls.label: When saving lite cache data, images cannot be downloaded.
You can include private data such as personal cache notes and corrected coordinates.
Highlights can get out of sync for offline lists if those highlights have been removed or changed on another device.
Save all highlighted caches to a list
Images will be downloaded if they are available in the GPX file.
Sending as a log will change the Draft into a log and will submit to geocaching.com.
Sending the log now will upload the current log to geocaching.com. Turning this option off will save to pending logs.
You can choose to ROT13 encrypt your log entry. Text within brackets [like this] will not be encrypted.
Limit to State, Province  or Country
Choosing a log type will allow for auto-inserting of the template text when you create a log that matches this type.
Open Cycle, Landscape and Outdoors maps from Thunderforest now require a use of a map key.
Remaining lite geocaches and time until that number is reset.
Remaining full geocaches and time until that number is reset.
